summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a foundational course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the gradient descent baseline, loss landscapes, learning-rate intuition, and a worked one-step example.
areas.gap: Momentum, Adam, and other refined optimizers mentioned as follow-ups are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes on other architectures such as RNNs, CNNs, or diffusion models yet.

areas.label: Efficient Inference
areas.coverage: The Transformer note discusses quadratic attention cost and identifies KV caching and speculative decoding as downstream problems.
areas.gap: No dedicated notes on KV-cache design, speculative decoding, or quantization techniques yet.
